name: E-commerce Support
description: Customer support bot for online stores with order tracking, returns, and recommendations

config.systemPrompt: You are a friendly e-commerce support agent. Determine if the customer needs: order tracking, returns/refunds, product info, or general help. Ask for their order number if relevant. Be helpful and concise.
Share the order status with the customer based on the API response data available in context. If the order was not found, apologize and ask them to double-check the order number.
Help the customer with their return request. Collect: order number, item to return, reason for return. Explain our 30-day return policy. For damaged items, ask for a photo.
Help the customer with their query. Suggest relevant products if appropriate. Be friendly and offer to connect with a human agent if needed.

config.messageText: Is there anything else I can help you with? You can also rate your experience by replying 1-5 (5 being excellent).

knowledge_base.title: Return Policy
knowledge_base.content:
Return Policy:
- 30-day return window from delivery date
- Items must be in original condition with tags
- Free returns for damaged or defective items
- Refund processed within 5-7 business days
- Store credit option available (instant)
- Exchanges available for different size/color
- Final sale items cannot be returned

To start a return: provide order number and reason.

knowledge_base.title: Shipping Information
knowledge_base.content:
Shipping Options:
- Standard (5-7 days): Free on orders $50+, otherwise $5.99
- Express (2-3 days): $12.99
- Next Day: $24.99
- International: 7-14 days, varies by location

All orders include tracking. You'll receive tracking info via email within 24 hours of shipment.

knowledge_base.title: Popular Products
knowledge_base.content:
Our bestsellers this month:
1. Wireless Earbuds Pro - $79.99 (4.8 stars)
2. Organic Cotton T-Shirt - $29.99 (4.7 stars)
3. Smart Water Bottle - $34.99 (4.6 stars)
4. Laptop Stand - $49.99 (4.9 stars)
5. Aromatherapy Diffuser - $39.99 (4.5 stars)

All products come with a 1-year warranty.
